name: Iain McGilchrist
core_thesis: Article-backed thinker stub created during primitives_v2 Phase 2 from `data/articles/source/mcgilchrist.md`.

primitive_commitments.citation_locus: The Matter with Things, vol. II, ch. 27
The Master and His Emissary, Part Two
The Matter with Things, vol. II, chs. 20-28

cross_engagements.brief: Alfred North Whitehead presses the same temporal mode axis in the metaphysical register, but with the value `process-primary` rather than `both-orthogonal`.
G. W. F. Hegel presses the same social formation axis in the political-social register, but with the value `recognitive-institutional` rather than `civilizational-structure-shift`.
Aurobindo also insists that a timeless poise and a dynamic unfolding must be held together rather than collapsed into a flat process-metaphysics.
